issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: intent lost or altered explicit millimeter values from the user request: [35.0, 18.0, 2.0]; rising_coil direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 1.05986 mm but at least 18 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.4, 0.5, 0.25, 0.5, 0.4, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; escape_stage relative first waypoint must advance along the incoming tangent before the lateral freeform turn; axial projection is -8.48528 mm for incoming heading [-0.707107, 0.565685, 0.424264] and first offset [15.0, 0.0, 5.0]. Make that offset a positive parallel multiple of the incoming heading; escape_stage relative first waypoint is too close/off-axis for a regular tangent entry: its circular-entry radius is 9.36915 mm but at least 18 mm is required. Move the first anchor farther along the incoming tangent before turning; escape_stage direct required-anchor realization predicts a minimum curvature radius of 0.932864 mm but at least 18 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.55, 0.25, 0.4, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
